tweets.text:
The hardest part of building with AI agents isn't the tech.

It's memory.

An agent with no memory repeats mistakes.
An agent with bad memory hallucinates context.
An agent with good memory compounds knowledge over time.

We obsess over model benchmarks.

The real differentiator
tweets.name: Bhuvan

tweets.text:
Agent Capability = Tools × Context × Persona × Memory × Skill × Workspace × Governance

Every Agent has 3 core assets:
SOUL — identity
MEMORY — experience
SKILL — method

Sustainable Agent = Persona + Memory + Skill

tweets.text: AI agent memory is a new attack surface. Long-term memory stores are usually external databases. If those stores are writable by the agent and readable across sessions, an attacker who injects content into memory can influence future agent behavior without touching the model.

Any AI agent without persistent onchain memory is going to be obsolete by Q4 because $WAL just solved statelessness.

tweets.name: AikaXBT

tweets.text:
4 memory layers every production agent needs:

1/ Working memory — active context
2/ Episodic memory — behavioural history
3/ Entity store — factual knowledge
4/ Vector store — semantic understanding

Most agents have layer 1 only.

Fix the memory. Not the model. 
#AIAgents #LLM
tweets.name: Mo

tweets.text:
one of the things that makes an agent "deep" is memory. and in production, memory needs to be maintained: consolidated, pruned, refined over time.

in a multi-tenant application, that means doing it at scale, per user, in the background. cron is built into langsmith's agent

Observation: Teams are spending 40%+ of their token budget just re-establishing context that agents forgot from the last session.

The problem isn't the model. It's that agent memory has no persistence layer.

We built Memoria — version control for AI agent memory. Think Git, but https://t.co/FcUa0E2ZK7

tweets.name: Connected Data

tweets.text:
Agent的记忆系统，决定了它的"智商"上限。

Agent的记忆分为3层：

1️⃣ 工作记忆（Working Memory）
- 当前任务的上下文
- 类似人的"短期记忆"
- 容量有限，用完就忘

2️⃣ 情景记忆（Episodic Memory）
- 过去的经历和经验
- 类似人的"长期记忆"
- 可以持久保存

3️⃣ 语义记忆（Semantic Memory）
-
tweets.name: 胖橙AI
